name: Summit Ridge 3-in-1 Jacket
description: A versatile 3-in-1 with a waterproof hardshell outer and a zip-in insulated fleece liner. Wear together for deep cold or separately across the shoulder seasons. Fully seam-sealed with pit-zip venting.

name: Cascade Rain Shell
description: An ultralight, packable 2.5-layer rain shell that stuffs into its own pocket. Adjustable hood and hem, taped seams, and pit zips for breathability on the move.

name: Emberlite Down Hoody
description: 650-fill responsibly sourced down hoody that packs to the size of a water bottle. Ideal as a mid-layer or standalone on crisp evenings around camp.

name: Basecamp 2P Tent
description: A freestanding 3-season 2-person tent with two doors and two vestibules. 3000mm waterproof floor, color-coded poles, and a 2.4 kg packed weight that splits easily between two packs.

name: Basecamp 4P Tent
description: The family-sized version of our Basecamp shelter. Near-vertical walls maximize headroom, and the full-coverage rainfly keeps four people dry in a downpour.

name: Nightfall 20° Sleeping Bag
description: A 20°F (-6°C) mummy bag with water-resistant synthetic fill that keeps loft even when damp. Anti-snag zipper and an insulated draft collar for cold nights.

name: Cloudrest Sleeping Pad
description: An inflatable pad with an R-value of 4.2 for year-round warmth. Packs to the size of a 1L bottle and inflates in about 10 breaths.

name: Trailhead 55L Backpack
description: A 55-liter multi-day pack with an adjustable suspension, ventilated back panel, and a floating lid. Comfortably carries loads up to 18 kg. Includes a rain cover.

name: Daybreak 22L Daypack
description: A 22-liter daypack with a hydration sleeve, padded laptop pocket, and a stowaway hip belt. Great for day hikes and doubling as a commuter bag.

name: Bedrock Waterproof Hiking Boots
description: A waterproof-membrane mid boot with a grippy lugged outsole and a supportive shank for loaded hikes. Broken in comfortable straight out of the box.

name: Switchback Trail Runners
description: A lightweight, breathable trail runner with a rock plate and aggressive lugs for technical terrain. Quick-drying mesh upper for creek crossings and hot days.

name: Trailhead Insulated Bottle 1L
description: Double-wall vacuum-insulated stainless bottle that keeps drinks cold 24 hours or hot 12. Leakproof lid and a powder-coated no-slip finish.

name: Firefly Headlamp 400
description: A 400-lumen rechargeable headlamp with a red night mode, a lock function to prevent accidental drain, and up to 40 hours of runtime on low.

name: Alpine Wool Hiking Socks (2-Pack)
description: Merino wool blend socks with cushioned zones and a seamless toe. Temperature-regulating and odor-resistant for multi-day trips.
